# GammaLedger

> GammaLedger is a privacy-first, browser-based options trading analytics platform. It helps active options traders analyze strategies, track performance, and optimize trades using professional-grade tools — all running locally with zero cloud dependency.

## Core Value Proposition

- **Complete Privacy**: All data is stored locally in the browser (IndexedDB). No servers, no cloud, no tracking.
- **Professional Analytics**: Track 50+ options strategies including Wheel, PMCC, Iron Condors, Spreads, Straddles, and more.
- **AI-Powered Coach**: Built-in AI assistant for trade analysis, risk assessment, and strategy recommendations.
- **Free & Open Source**: Released under the AGPLv3 license for non-commercial use.

## Key Features

- Multi-leg strategy tracking (PMCC, Wheel, Iron Condor, Collar, Spreads)
- Real-time Greeks monitoring (Delta, Gamma, Theta, Vega)
- Automatic roll detection and position grouping
- Unified dashboard with live P&L, win rates, and performance metrics
- OFX and JSON import/export for major brokers (Interactive Brokers, Schwab, Fidelity, E*TRADE)
- Portfolio sharing with social-media-optimized exports
- Trade journaling with Markdown support

## Target Users

- **Active Options Traders**: Managing complex multi-leg strategies with risk management needs
- **Portfolio Managers**: Consolidated reporting and risk assessment across accounts
- **Quantitative Analysts**: Data export and integration with analytical workflows
